title: ナチュラル・シチーガール

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hearing about a trendy cafe, I decide to
check it out for myself...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Jinkies! So this is the spiffy city cafe I've been
hear'n about!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, never been before, but it doesn't look half
bad. Seems pretty empty... Uh, Yukino?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Carrot mou...mousse! Carrot mousse
frappuccino!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Just say it right, 'n nobody'll laugh or yell at you!
Nothing ventured, nothing gained!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...I'll go first.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. Do you have anything that's low in
sugar? Oh, and make it a small.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Also, I'll take one of those... banana bread things.
With a bit of cream on top, please.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Golly gee! She orders way different from what I
read online and in those magazines! It's so...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Cool!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I-I see. I think I get it. As long I keep my cool, I'll be cool!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm gonna do it too...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! One carrot thing, please! With lots of
cream!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: City! Thanks for tagg'n along with me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No worries. I wanted to come anyways.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
By the way, why didn't you choose the carrot
thing?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It has too many calo—I mean, I just didn't feel like
it today. Maybe next time.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Just doing your own thing, huh.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I guess a real city girl doesn't feel the need to
follow the latest fads.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You downed that drink pretty fast, though.
Was it really that good?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! There were some carrots mixed into the
cream! And the frappuccino had...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both take turns giving their thoughts on
their orders. It seems like they're having a
wonderful time together.
